zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas West於1251年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir Thomas West26歲，母親Charlotte Louisa De England19歲。他於1308年之前與Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1326年在英國倫敦被列為knight。他去世於1343年11月1日在英國維爾爾斯瓦洛可拉福享年92歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾福格萊斯同 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas West于1251年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir Thomas West26岁，母亲Charlotte Louisa De England19岁。他于1308年之前与Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1326年在英国倫敦被列为knight。他去世于1343年11月1日在英国維爾爾斯瓦洛可拉福享年92岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾福格萊斯同 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas West was born in 1251, in Devon, England, his father, Sir Thomas West, was 26 and his mother, Charlotte Louisa De England, was 19. He married Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe before 1308, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1326, at the age of 75, his occupation is listed as knight in London, England. He died on 1 November 1343, in Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 92, and was buried in Fugglestone St Peter, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas West est né en 1251, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas West, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Charlotte Louisa De England, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe avant 1308, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1326, à l’âge de 75 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knight à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 1 novembre 1343, à Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterré à Fugglestone St Peter, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Peter Churchyard, Swallowcliffe, Wil: Fugglestone St Peter, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas West 1251 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas West 26 und seine Mutter Charlotte Louisa De England 19. Er hat vor 1308 in Devon, England Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1326, als er 75 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knight in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. November 1343 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Fugglestone St Peter, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe prima del 1308, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Westが1251年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Westは26歳，母Charlotte Louisa De Englandは19歳であった。1308年以前にイギリスデボンでAlianore Eleanor de Cantelupeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1326年，75歳の時，イギリスロンドンでの職業はknightと記録されている。彼は1343年11月1日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアスワロウクリフで92歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアフウググレストーン スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Peter Churchyard, Swallowcliffe, Wil: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 프글레스톤 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas West(이)가 1251년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas West(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Charlotte Louisa De England(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1308년 이전 영국 데폰에서 Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1326년, 75세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 knight이었다. 그는 1343년 11월 1일 영국 윌츠히르 스월로c리프에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 프글레스톤 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas West nasceu em 1251, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas West, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Charlotte Louisa De England, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe antes 1308, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1326, com 75 anos, sua profissão aparece como knight em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1343, em Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 92 anos, e foi sepultado em Fugglestone St Peter, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Peter Churchyard, Swallowcliffe, Wil: фьуглестоун ст питир, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas West родился в 1251 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas West было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Charlotte Louisa De England, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe перед 1308 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1326 году, в возрасте 75 лет,  он работал по профессии knight в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер 1 ноября 1343 г. в местности сваллоуклифф, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 92 лет и был похоронен в местности фьуглестоун ст питир, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
